evals.prompt: Format a post for the images in assets/images/xin-xin-rong-he/.
evals.expected_output: A complete _posts/YYYY-MM-DD-xin-xin-rong-he.md with valid frontmatter, landscape/portrait/diptych includes for all images, correct EXIF strings, blank description, a landscape cover image, and images renamed to descriptive slugs (e.g. stage.jpg, captain.jpg).

evals.prompt: Create a post from the images in assets/images/leica-welt/.
evals.expected_output: A complete _posts/YYYY-MM-DD-leica-welt.md with valid frontmatter, landscape/portrait/diptych includes for all 7 images, correct EXIF strings, blank description, a landscape cover image, and images renamed to descriptive slugs (e.g. logo.jpg, cafe-leitz.jpg).
